plugins.verifyConditionsCmd: echo "Checking required tools and env vars..." && command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || (echo "ERROR: jq not found" && exit 1) && command -v curl >/dev/null 2>&1 || (echo "ERROR: curl not found" && exit 1) && [ -n "${GH_TOKEN:-}" ] || (echo "ERROR: GH_TOKEN not set" && exit 1) && echo "Preflight checks passed."
